authorities.name: California Department of Fish and Wildlife

sources.title: CCR T14 §7.40(b)(96) — San Simeon Creek (San Luis Obispo Co.)
sources.quotedText: (96) San Simeon Creek (San Luis Obispo Co.) from mouth to the pedestrian bridge in San Simeon Beach State Park. Dec. 1 through Mar. 7, but only Sat., Sun., Wed., legal holidays and opening and closing days. Only barbless hooks may be used. 2 hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead. 4 hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead in possession.

sources.title: California Fish and Game Code §7145 — Sport Fishing License Requirement
sources.quotedText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

sources.title: USGS GNIS (The National Map Gazetteer) — Streams layer record for gaz_id 248969, "San Simeon Creek", Stream, San Luis Obispo Co., CA
sources.quotedText: {"gaz_id":248969,"gaz_name":"San Simeon Creek","gaz_featureclass":"Stream","fcode":46000,"state_alpha":"CA","county_name":"San Luis Obispo"}; geometry multipoint, first point (Web Mercator -13483843.7161, 4245070.8407) converts to lon -121.127429, lat 35.595253, at the creek mouth near San Simeon State Beach — ~1.5km from the file's previously recorded coordinate (-121.1390, 35.6050), which appears to have been guessed near San Simeon town/point rather than the creek itself; corrected to the GNIS mouth point.

parameters.note: Within the Dec. 1 through Mar. 7 season, open only on Saturdays, Sundays, Wednesdays, legal holidays, and the opening and closing days of the season. Applies from the creek mouth to the pedestrian bridge in San Simeon Beach State Park.

regulations.humanSummary: Open Dec. 1 through Mar. 7, but only Saturdays, Sundays, Wednesdays, legal holidays, and opening/closing days
regulations.verbatimText: Dec. 1 through Mar. 7, but only Sat., Sun., Wed., legal holidays and opening and closing days.

parameters.note: Only barbless hooks may be used.

regulations.humanSummary: Only barbless hooks may be used
regulations.verbatimText: Only barbless hooks may be used.

parameters.counting_rule: Limit is on hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead (marked/fin-clipped hatchery fish), counted together toward the daily and possession limits.

regulations.humanSummary: 2 hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead daily, 4 in possession
regulations.verbatimText: 2 hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead **. 4 hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead ** in possession.

parameters.note: Anglers 16 years of age or older must have a valid California sport fishing license.

regulations.humanSummary: California sport fishing license required for anglers 16+
regulations.verbatimText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...
